# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-MySQSQueue'
      MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds: 345600

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-MySNSTopic'

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    DependsOn: MySQSQueue
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowSendMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource:
              Fn::GetAtt:
                - MySNSTopic
                - Arn

  TopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    DependsOn: MySNSTopic
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - Ref: MySNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublishMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource:
              Fn::GetAtt:
                - MySNSTopic
                - Arn

Outputs:
  SQSQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt 'MySQSQueue.Arn'
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !GetAtt 'MySNSTopic.Arn'
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
